channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Severe surface defects,, 29th April
item.description:
Large area of road surface failure with loose aggregates, potholes forming, and failed patch repairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-6, Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes in road, 29th April
item.description:
In road between Elkstone Court and Rose Cottage, Elkstone GL53 9PB
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are about 5 deep and growing potholes from the main road junction towards Field Close, 29th April
item.description:
Between Westerleigh X-roads and Field Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and significant surface erosion next to recent patch repairs, 29th April
item.description:
There are multiple potholes on the road, the road surface has significantly eroded.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26-31, Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement damage, 29th April
item.description:
There was a report of pavement damage here, you have just come out and put a barrier around it and removed the problem as fixed it’s still there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bassett Close, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unusable cycle lane, 29th April
item.description:
The cycle lane around the outside of this roundabout is covered in grit and debris. It is very difficult & dangerous to cycle in the lane. A van pulled out in front of me when I was cycling on the path, I braked but due to the volume of grit & debris in the cycle lane my back wheel spun out and I fell into the roundabout. Thankfully no other vehicle was to the side of me to cause an accident!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road Junction, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 18 yarnolds bins left on kerb as well as other rubbish, 29th April
item.description:
The bins have been left on the pavement as well as a chair and boxes since last summer. Also electric leads to a vehicle with a piece of wood on top at various times. You are not able to pass these items with a pushchair or walking frame. So you have to walk on the road. Safety is an issue and dangerous due to vehicles coming round the bend.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Yarnolds, Shurdington, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Large ash tree branch on public highway, 29th April
item.description:
Branch is now on the grass verge - public highway outside number 26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: Large pothole Causing house to vibrate, 29th April
item.description:
The hole is outside 47 Charlton Lane, Cheltenham. Large vehicles hitting the hole Make my house Vibrate & will cause damage if it is not fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Charlton Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside 151 Hewlett Road, 29th April
item.description:
Pothole outside 151 Hewlett Road, where various utility works and repairs have failed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pole is out of the ground and laying down, 29th April
item.description:
On the corner of the road/path on the left as you turn into pure offices

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long, deep pothole by post box, 29th April
item.description:
Next to the postbox opposite Brendon View care home. It's been getting worse over the last two weeks, and would be incredibly dangerous to admit cyclist who didn't see it as it would trap their wheel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22a, Libertus Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shelter needs sprucing up, 29th April
item.description:
The shelter has really had its time, plastic windows dirty, graffitied or missing. Bus Stop flag has faded, no timetable casing either. I do understand that it does cost alot to replace these shelters however k think this one has really had it’s time considering the description I’ve given. It’s the bus stop heading towards Town Centre by the Prince of Wales Stadium bus stop is called Recreation Centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tommy Taylors Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signage left behind, 29th April
item.description:
There is no category for you left your signs behind please come collected them. Two sets about 50M apart Newcourt Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newcourt Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed
